title: Our Travel Journal
tagline: Stories, notes, and favorite places from the road.
description: A personal travel journal with trip notes, photos, maps, and practical recommendations.
homeTitle: A living record of where we have been and what we loved.
homeIntro: Use this space for the short version of your travel story: who you are, how you travel, and what people will find here.
about: We built this site as a simple place to collect the stories, photos, routes, meals, stays, and small details that make each trip memorable.
It is intentionally low-maintenance: each trip is just one Markdown file, so adding a new adventure should feel as easy as writing a note.
Replace these paragraphs with your own introduction, travel philosophy, and anything you want friends or family to know before they browse.
